family_summary: This overwrite replaces a thin whole-war scaffold with three stronger urban/siege episodes: Karantina, Tel al-Zaatar, and Sabra/Shatila. These rows remain partial, but they are much more publishable than a national excess-mortality skeleton.
notes: Direct violent deaths only. Indirect siege mortality and countrywide excess-mortality debates are excluded from the baseline path. Episodeization is mandatory and used here.
